templates.name: Feature Addition
templates.description: Add a new feature to an existing codebase following project patterns

structured_rubric.label: Functional correctness
structured_rubric.description: Feature works as specified and meets acceptance criteria

structured_rubric.label: Code quality
structured_rubric.description: Follows existing patterns, proper error handling, no code smells

structured_rubric.label: Testing
structured_rubric.description: New tests pass, existing tests still pass

structured_rubric.label: Documentation
structured_rubric.description: Code is self-documenting, comments added where helpful

structured_rubric.label: Minimality
structured_rubric.description: No over-engineering, minimal changes to achieve goal

templates.name: Bug Fix
templates.description: Identify and fix a bug in existing functionality

structured_rubric.label: Fix correctness
structured_rubric.description: Fix resolves the issue without introducing new problems

structured_rubric.label: Testing
structured_rubric.description: Test case added or existing tests verify fix

templates.name: Code Refactoring
templates.description: Improve code structure without changing external behavior

structured_rubric.label: Behavior preservation
structured_rubric.description: All existing tests pass, behavior unchanged

structured_rubric.label: Code quality improvement
structured_rubric.description: Better organization, reduced duplication, clearer naming

structured_rubric.label: Documentation
structured_rubric.description: Comments or docs updated if needed

example_acceptance_criteria: All existing tests continue to pass
No change in external API or behavior

templates.name: API Integration
templates.description: Integrate with an external API or service

structured_rubric.label: Functional correctness
structured_rubric.description: API calls work correctly, data handled properly

structured_rubric.label: Error handling
structured_rubric.description: Network errors, rate limits, invalid responses handled

structured_rubric.label: Security
structured_rubric.description: API keys secured, no sensitive data logged
